allow: Bash(mkdir -p RentYourTime/RentYourTime/App RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Core RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Features/Onboarding RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Features/Dashboard RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Features/ScreenTime RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Features/History RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Features/Settings RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Services RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Models RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Components RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Extensions RentYourTime/RentYourTime/Resources RentYourTime/RentYourTimeTests RentYourTime/Extensions/DeviceActivityMonitor RentYourTime/Extensions/DeviceActivityReport RentYourTime/docs)
Bash(xcodebuild -project RentYourTime.xcodeproj -target RentYourTime -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug build)
Bash(xcodebuild -project RentYourTime.xcodeproj -target RentYourTime -sdk iphoneos -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build)
Bash(xcodebuild -project RentYourTime.xcodeproj -target RentYourTimeTests -sdk iphonesimulator -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build)
Bash(xcodebuild -project RentYourTime.xcodeproj -target DeviceActivityMonitorExtension -sdk iphoneos -configuration Debug CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build)
